author: liujshi
name: PR #1797 base + Smear Gate + LQER Asymmetric + Phased TTT + per-group lrzip
technique_summary: PR #1797 base (CaseOps + SparseAttnGate + PolarNS + MIN_LR + FusedCE + TTT warm-A) + Smear Gate (window 12) + LQER asymmetric rank-4 (INT2/INT4, top-3, group 64) + Phased TTT (3 phases, 2000-doc prefix, score-first) + int6 GPTQ (ATTN/EMBED/MLP clip 12.0, matrix clip 12.85, embed_wd 0.06) + brotli + PR #1855 per-group lrzip
based_on: PR #1797 by @dexhunter (Smear Gate + LQER Asymmetric), which extends PR #1787 by @nprime06 (SparseAttnGate + PolarNS + MIN_LR + FusedCE); compression from PR #1855 by @codemath3000
